title: a11y — AI Eyes & Hands: 24-Action UI Automation Cheatsheet
desc: AI is a blind person with no hands. wkappbot a11y gives it sight (inspect/find/ocr/screenshot) and touch (click/type/invoke/scroll). 3-tier native fallback: UIA→Win32→SendInput. Web: CSS→CDP→UIA. grap = universal target language.
steps: [PHILOSOPHY] AI = blind person with no hands. a11y = sensory bridge to the running OS. Sight: inspect/find/ocr/screenshot. Touch: click/type/invoke/toggle/scroll. Without a11y, AI can only read files and call APIs — it cannot see or touch any running app.

[FALLBACK-NATIVE] 3 tiers, auto-escalate: T1=UIA patterns (focusless, fastest) → T2=Win32 PostMessage (focusless) → T3=SendInput physical (needs focus+readiness). T1 covers: invoke, toggle, select, expand, collapse, set-value, scroll, type(WM_CHAR). T3 only for: hotkey, physical click.

[FALLBACK-WEB] Browser auto-detected via CDP port. W1=CSS selector→CDP direct. W2=CDP telepathy (any browser HWND). W3=UIA fallback. CSS auto-routed when #scope starts with '.','[', contains '>','~','+',':', or is an HTML tag name. Wildcards(*?) force UIA Name instead.

[GRAP-WINDOW] Pattern before #: '*App*' wildcard | '*메모장*;*Notepad*' OR(;) | {title:'Chrome',domain:'claude.ai'} JSON5-AND | '*hwnd=001A0F2C*' exact handle | 'pid:1234' process | 'regex:note.*' regex. Matching: Contains by default, case-insensitive.

[GRAP-SCOPE] Pattern after # = UIA subtree drill. '*App*#*Panel*#*Button*' = chain drill (each # = one UIA level deeper). '#button.send' = CSS auto-routed to CDP. '#{aid:"ok",type:"Button"}' JSON5-AND on UIA props. '#regex:btn_\d+'. Multiple # levels chain: win#scope1#scope2.

[GRAP-TABPORTAL] Tab portal: '*Chrome*#ChatGPT#input.prompt' → Chrome window → switch to ChatGPT tab (SelectionItem.Select, focusless!) → target CSS inside. Works with Edge/Brave too. For web-only targeting: '*Chrome*#chatgpt.com#button.send' (URL hint → tab match → CSS).

[ACTIONS-DISCOVER] inspect "*App*" --depth 5 (UIA tree dump, depth 1-10). windows (list all visible). find "*App*#*pattern*" (search tree). screenshot "*App*" (capture). ocr "*App*" (extract text). RULE: always run inspect before automating an unfamiliar app.

[ACTIONS-WINDOW] focus/minimize/maximize/restore/close "*App*". move "*App*" --x N --y N. resize "*App*" --w N --h N. close on browser: requires #tabHint to prevent accidental browser close (guard). --force: WM_CLOSE then Process.Kill.

[ACTIONS-ELEMENT] invoke(UIA InvokePattern→BM_CLICK→WM_LBUTTON). click(physical coords). toggle(UIA TogglePattern). expand/collapse(UIA ExpandCollapse). select(UIA SelectionItem). scroll --direction up|down|left|right --amount small|large. read(Name/Value/Text). wait --condition 'text' --not --timeout N.

[ACTIONS-TYPE] Normal: 'a11y type "*Edit*" "hello"' → UIA Value→WM_CHAR→LegacyIA→SendKeys chain (focusless tiers first). Hotkey/menu: '--hotkey' flag → scans accesskey+aria-keyshortcuts+menu labels → dispatches focuslessly (e.g. 'File/Save'). CJK auto-detected → CDP Input.insertText (bypasses IME). set-value = UIA Value direct. set-range --value N = UIA RangeValue.
[ACTIONS-CLIPBOARD] clipboard-read (Unicode+CP949). clipboard-write "text" [file.png] — mixed text+files. clipboard-write supports [file:name] inline markers (same as slack send). clipboard = help.

[EVAL-JS] --eval-js "js" runs BEFORE the main action (pre-hook: e.g. remove disabled). For read/find it IS the action. No #scope → CdpSwitchToTabByHint (Priority1: URL hint, Priority2: window title). 'a11y read "*Chrome*" --eval-js "document.title"' auto-finds tab. 'a11y click "*Chrome*#btn.send" --eval-js "el.disabled=false"' pre-hook. 'a11y eval' + 'web eval' = DEPRECATED, scheduled for removal (AutoRegisterBug on use).

[FLAGS] --nth N|range('2~4','3~','~3','1,3~'): pick specific match. --all: apply to all matches. --depth N: UIA tree depth (default 3). --speak: TTS read result. --condition 'text'/--not: wait for text presence/absence. --timeout N: ms (default 10000). --interval N: poll ms (default 500). --force: hard kill. --hotkey: menu/label dispatch. --allow-ancestors: bypass window-hierarchy guard.

[AAR] Action-Aware Readiness runs automatically before interactive actions. S0: screen-lock check. S1: minimized window → SW_SHOWNOACTIVATE restore. S2: DetectBlocker — modal/overlay auto-dismiss; blocked → policy. S2.5: 100ms 2-shot stability probe. S3: stale element re-fetch. S4: action-specific (Enabled/Visible/!ReadOnly for type/set-value). Returns null=block, same=proceed, different=retarget(popup).

[AMBIGUITY-GUARD] 6 layers, auto-triggered on failure — READ the output and use the suggested grap. L1: multi-window → JSON5+verify hints. L2: modal blocking → auto-list alert buttons. L3: focused/leaf node → parent chain+grap. L4: Win32 child missing → sibling windows. L5: no #scope on element action → root children+focus chain. L6: UIA scope miss → available elements list.

[ANDROID] adb://<device>/<pkg-grap>#<scope>. 'a11y click "adb://Fold5/*heromts*#해외잔고"'. Wildcard device: 'adb://*heromts*#el'. Inner display: 'adb://SM-F946N/*heromts*#계좌 --outer'. Same grap syntax, same 3-tier fallback via ADB accessibility service.

[QUICK-REF] Discover: 'a11y inspect "*App*" --depth 3'. Click button: 'a11y invoke "*App*#*OK*"' (focusless). Type: 'a11y type "*App*#*Edit*" "text"'. Read: 'a11y read "*App*#*Result*"'. Wait: 'a11y wait "*App*#*Status*" --condition "완료" --timeout 30000'. Web read: 'a11y read "*Chrome*#chatgpt.com" --eval-js "document.body.innerText.substring(0,500)"'.

[TROUBLESHOOT] 'No window found' → check 'a11y windows', fix grap pattern. 'UIA scope not found' → L6 guard lists available. 'Modal blocking' → L2 guard, dismiss first. All tiers fail (MFC/owner-drawn) → 'a11y hack "*App*"' triggers OCR+Vision+DYN dynamic IDs. CDP eval wrong tab → add #scope URL hint. Stale hwnd → element moved, re-run inspect.

[VETERAN-TIERS] T1 hollow-stub: WM_NULL baseline → InvokePattern latency >baseline+2ms = stub, skip to T2. T2 MFC: EM_SETSEL/WM_SETTEXT fail on CMaskEditEx → WM_CHAR only (TranslateMessage auto-generates WM_CHAR, never EM_SETTEXT = double input). T3 Flutter: PostMessage WM_LBUTTON → 300ms pixel-diff >2% → physical fallback. FLUTTERVIEW: Tier0 PostMessage bypass. TypeViaIme: AttachThreadInput+ImmSetCompositionString+CPS_COMPLETE.

[VETERAN-CDP] IsBrowserProcess(): Chrome/Edge/Brave/Firefox only — non-browser Electron (VS Code) excluded. SwitchToTargetAsync: URL→title priority, skipMinimize for read-only. Runtime.enable: 4x exponential backoff. EvalAsync: 3 retries (500ms/1000ms). Targetless eval = undefined behavior (wrong tab/frame silent failure) — always provide #scope.

[VETERAN-EXPDB] Per-process/class knowhow cache: wkappbot.hq/experience/{proc}/{class}/knowhow-{action}.md. RecordTierSuccess() auto-saves winning tier. LoadKnowhow() prefetches hints. OcrCorrectionDb: pixel-hash→correct-text self-learning dict. DYN-A11Y: CCA segmentation→OCR→Vision API for owner-drawn → dyn_r{row}c{col} dynamic IDs cached in experience DB.
refs: csharp/src/WKAppBot.CLI/Commands/A11yCommand.cs → action routing, grap parsing, fallback tiers
author: claude
